text:
On a moonless night, young Willow Oakwood wandered through an ornate forest she'd dreamed about. She wore a dress of pale orange moonlight. She heard soft laughter. Oh... maybe...?

A young maiden with cascading raven hair paused nearby. Willow hid.

"The stars... they dance."

Willow listened. Oh...

"My dear... do you hear that?

A tiny creature with wings like lace fluttered near. Willow held her nose.

That's... definitely... not...

It twinkled. It giggled.

You're lovely, aren the...?

Willow wanted company. She approached. Oh...

"I'm... OW!

Willow smiled sheepishly. She'd love that. Perhaps one day?

They danced.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
